name: Campbell WF3 — Code Review with Human-in-the-Loop

_meta.description: WF3 — Campbell Code Review with Human-in-the-Loop. Triggered by POST from Campbell API when Kaji diagnoses an incident. Formats a code review summary with the diff, risk level, and historical reference, then posts to #campbell-ops-alerts with ✅ Approve and ❌ Reject action buttons. Buttons call back directly to the Campbell API (no additional n8n step needed).
_meta.demo_talking_point: Kaji finds the fix. n8n holds it for review. Jimmy approves from Mattermost. Nobody touched a server.
_meta.import_instructions: Import this workflow in n8n v2 at https://n8n-v2.dev.hyperplane.dev. The webhook URL will be generated after activation. Update DEMO_URL in Campbell API env vars if needed.
